body.title: Install pre-commit git hook rejecting .env/*.db/runtime paths/--amend (T-cc-hook-autonomics follow-up)
body.result: Pre-commit guards (.env/*.db/runtime/dsb) + prepare-commit-msg amend-reject + committed session-start hook script. Tests: 5/5 pass. Commit 7f27583d.
body.description:
T-cc-hook-autonomics closed but only shipped half of its scope: the session-start hook was installed, but the pre-commit git hook was not. Also the session-start hook script (lab/claudecode/hooks/session-start/igor-env-check.sh) was created but not committed to the repo.

Finish the work:

1. Install a pre-commit guard (separate from the pre-existing `lab/claudecode/hooks/pre-commit` skills-sync hook). Options: (a) append to the existing pre-commit script, or (b) rename existing to `pre-commit-skills-sync.sh` and create a new top-level pre-commit that invokes both. Prefer option (a) — single file, chained checks.

2. The guard rejects: staged `.env` / `.env.*` files; staged `*.db` files; staged files under `~/.TheIgors/` runtime paths (unlikely to be staged but guard anyway); direct edits to `lab/design_docs_for_igor/decisions_log.dsb` (must go through /decided); `git commit --amend` (check for it via the commit message or rely on git's own amend behavior — harder to detect, may need a commit-msg hook instead).

3. Commit the session-start hook script `lab/claudecode/hooks/session-start/igor-env-check.sh` (currently untracked, created by T-cc-hook-autonomics but not staged).

4. Add a test at tests/hooks/test_pre_commit_guard.sh that: creates a temp git repo, stages a `.env` file, invokes the hook, asserts nonzero exit + stderr mentions `.env`. Repeat per rejection rule.

Scope: pre-commit guard + commit the session-start script + minimal test. Files: lab/claudecode/hooks/pre-commit (extend), lab/claudecode/hooks/session-start/igor-env-check.sh (commit), tests/hooks/test_pre_commit_guard.sh (new).

test_plan: (1) Stage .env — hook rejects. (2) Stage a normal .py file — hook accepts. (3) Stage .db file — rejects. (4) Normal commit flow unaffected.
